# DataKern Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-02-18

## Active Technologies

- Python 3.12 (backend, data_manipulation), TypeScript/Angular 20 (frontend) + FastAPI, SQLModel, Pydantic v2, pandas, geopandas (backend); Angular Material, Tailwind CSS, geonetwork-ui 2.9.0 (frontend) (001-preview-column-actions)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

Python 3.12 (backend, data_manipulation), TypeScript/Angular 20 (frontend): Follow standard conventions
